name: @leji-internal/sdk-py
description: npm workspace stub for the Python SDK; the real package metadata is pyproject.toml. Lets `npm test --workspaces` run the pytest suite. Never published to npm.

scripts.lint: (./.venv/bin/python -m ruff check . && ./.venv/bin/python -m ruff format --check . && ./.venv/bin/python -m mypy src) 2>/dev/null || (ruff check . && ruff format --check . && mypy src)
scripts.test: npm run lint && (./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pytest -q)
scripts.coverage: (./.venv/bin/coverage run -m pytest -q 2>/dev/null || coverage run -m pytest -q) && (./.venv/bin/coverage report 2>/dev/null || coverage report)
